/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/main.dir/main.cc.o ../../lib/util/CMakeFiles/util.dir/xml2asmprog.cc.o ../../lib/instr/CMakeFiles/instr.dir/asmdataflow.cc.o ../../lib/instr/CMakeFiles/instr.dir/asmprog.cc.o ../../lib/instr/CMakeFiles/instr.dir/asmprog2colored.cc.o ../../lib/instr/CMakeFiles/instr.dir/predataflowpass.cc.o ../../lib/reg/CMakeFiles/reg.dir/buildIg.cc.o ../../lib/reg/CMakeFiles/reg.dir/coloring.cc.o ../../lib/reg/CMakeFiles/reg.dir/ig.cc.o ../../lib/reg/CMakeFiles/reg.dir/simcoafrespisel.cc.o ../../vendor/tinyxml2/CMakeFiles/vendor_xml.dir/tinyxml2.cc.o -o main
